depression.description: I often feel completely overwhelmed by my friends' problems, especially Yvonne's situation. It's like I'm carrying their burdens, and it's draining me emotionally.
I feel guilty whenever I think about setting boundaries with my friends. I worry that if I don't always support them, they will feel abandoned or that I don't care.
I keep thinking that none of my efforts really matter. No matter what I do, my friends are still unhappy, and I feel just as unhappy as they are.
I often feel helpless, like there's nothing I can do to change my friends' situations. It's frustrating because I want to help, but I just end up feeling powerless.
I find myself constantly ruminating about my friends' unhappiness, and it makes me feel sad and lonely. I can't shake the feeling that I'm not doing enough.
